LINK_POWER.title: Destruction Eye
LINK_POWER.description: This [Destruction Eye] deals {RelayRatio}% of HP it loses to the linked enemy. On destruction, it deals {Amount} damage. Reapplying it increases explosion damage.
LINK_POWER.smartDescription: This [Destruction Eye] deals {RelayRatio}% of HP it loses to the linked enemy. On destruction, it deals {Amount} damage. Reapplying it increases explosion damage.
MADNESS_POWER.title: Madness
MADNESS_POWER.description: Your next Attack targets ALL enemies. After it resolves, lose 1.
MADNESS_POWER.smartDescription: Your next Attack targets ALL enemies. After it resolves, lose 1.
BLOODSHED_POWER.title: Bloodshed
BLOODSHED_POWER.description: Tracks HP damage dealt on the field this turn. Resets at the start of your turn.
BLOODSHED_POWER.smartDescription: Tracks HP damage dealt on the field this turn. Resets at the start of your turn.
